title: guettarda frondosa
intro: Guettarda frondosa, also known as the Pride of India or Queen's Wreath, is a flowering plant species in the Rubiaceae family, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The leaves and flowers of Guettarda frondosa are traditionally used in herbal medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to provide several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Guettarda frondosa can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to leverage its medicinal and health benefits.
